name: Pistou with Pepitas
recipeIngredient: 1 Large bunch fresh basil, washed, spun dry and sorted
1/2 Cup grated Parmesan cheese (or Dry Aged Spanish Cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. With the machine running, drop the peeled garlic through the feed tube of a food processor.
2. Add the pumpkin seeds and chopped basil leaves to the processor and process until pureed. If needed, add a small amount of water to help blend the ingredients smoothly.
3. Turn off the machine, then add the grated Parmesan cheese.
4. Turn the machine back on and slowly pour in the olive oil through the feed tube. Continue processing until the oil is fully incorporated and the mixture forms a smooth paste.
5. Serve the pistou over soup.
Yield: about 1 cup
